'''Government Center''' was a tall tower-like structure that served as the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] local headquarters on [[Phorliss]].

==Appearances==
*[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 4|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 4]]
